name: Whiteboard App
description: Collaborative whiteboard with hand-drawn feel for sketching diagrams, wireframes, flowcharts, and visual brainstorming. Canvas-based drawing with shapes, text, arrows, freehand, and export. Like Excalidraw. Best for whiteboarding tools, diagram editors, wireframe builders, or any sketch-based visual collaboration.

deploy.title: Deploy your Whiteboard
deploy.subtitle: Like Excalidraw — your own branded whiteboard in minutes
